title: Anbenum Aayudham lyrics in Tamil
stanzas:
Uyri Paadhi Unake oh..
Unil Paadhi Enakke oh..
Anbenum Aayudham Thaane
Oru Veeran Nenjame

Narai Vandhum Ennake oh..
Thunai Neeye Aruge oh..
Anbenum Aayudham Thaane
Oru Veeran Nenjame

Puyal Kaatril Pani Sernthaal
Uyir Theeye Unaikaaka
Anbenum Aayudham Naane
Endrendrum Veerane

Enakana Mugame oh..
Dhinam Paarka Varame oh..
Anbenum Aayudham Thaane
Undhan Nenjame

Surukangal Nerungum oh..
Nee Vendum Udane oh..
Anbenum Aayudham Thaane
Undhan Nenjame

Viralodu Viral Korthu
Maarodu Annaipaaye
Anbenum Aayudham Neeye
Endrendrum Veerane
tamilStanzas:
உயிர் பாதி உனக்கே ஒ ... 
உன்னில் பாதி எனக்கே ஒ
அன்பெனும் ஆயுதம் தானே
ஒரு வீரன் நெஞ்சமே

நரை வந்தும் எனக்கே ஒ
துணை நீயே அருகே ஒ
அன்பெனும் ஆயுதம் தானே
ஒரு வீரன் நெஞ்சமே

புயல் காற்றில் பனி சேர்ந்தால்
உயிர் தீயே உனைக்காக்க
அன்பெனும் ஆயுதம் தானே
என்றென்றும் வீரனே

எனக்கான முகமே ஒ
தினம் பார்க்க வரமே ஒ
அன்பெனும் ஆயுதம் தானே
உந்தன் நெஞ்சமே

சுருக்கங்கள் நெருங்கும் ஒ
நீ வேண்டும் உடனே ஒ
அன்பெனும் ஆயுதம் தானே
என்றென்றும் வீரனே
உந்தன் நெஞ்சமே

விரலோடு விறல் கோர்த்து
மாரோடு அணைப்பாயே
அன்பெனும் ஆயுதம் தானே
என்றென்றும் வீரனே

seo.title: Anbenum Aayudham lyrics in Tamil
seo.description: Full Anbenum songs lyrics in tamil (உயிர் பாதி உனக்கே ஒ ...  ...) Leo Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Singer(s): Anirudh, Lothika.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Anbenum Aayudham conveys themes of bravery and resilience, encouraging listeners to embrace their inner strength.

How does this song fit into the plot of Leo?

This song highlights a pivotal moment in the film where the protagonist finds motivation and courage to face challenges.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Anirudh and Lothika.

When was the song released?

Anbenum Aayudham was released on March 23, 2024.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Anbenum Aayudham, the protagonists are inspired to embrace their inner warrior, reflecting the film's overarching themes of courage and resilience. The song's energetic beats and uplifting lyrics create an atmosphere of motivation, making it perfect for moments of celebration and empowerment. As Anirudh and Lothika's voices intertwine, listeners are drawn into a world where determination reigns supreme. This anthem not only resonates with the characters' journeys but also encourages audiences to find strength in their own lives.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the electrifying vibes of Anbenum Aayudham from the much-anticipated movie Leo. This dynamic duet features the captivating voices of Anirudh and Lothika, blending seamlessly to create an anthem of courage and determination. Get ready to be inspired by the powerful lyrics and infectious energy that this song brings!
stanzaMeanings: Half of my life is for you, and half of my life is for me. My love is a weapon, my heart is a brave one.
When troubles come to me, you are my support. My love is a weapon, my heart is a brave one.
When storms and rain come together, my life is for you. My love is a weapon, I am always brave.
Why do you come to my face every day? My love is a weapon, your heart is mine.
When the waves calm down, you should come to me. My love is a weapon, your heart is mine.
With my hand in yours, we will fight together. My love is a weapon, you are always brave.
